title: Trying to delete a ›is-followed-by-episode‹ relationship with invalid PROGRAMME EPISODE ID
gherkin:
Given there exists a "PROGRAMME EPISODE" "The Holy Trinity"
And "PROGRAMME EPISODE" "Top Gear Special" does NOT exist
When the user deletes the "is followed by episode" relationship between "The Holy Trinity" and "Top Gear Special"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
